whatsapp_bubble.name: Xeyo WhatsApp bubble
whatsapp_bubble.intro: Your WhatsApp number is pulled automatically from your Xeyo account. Connect WhatsApp in Xeyo to activate the bubble. Customize its appearance below.
whatsapp_bubble.choices_intro: When enabled, clicking the bubble shows a welcome message and 2 buttons. Each button opens WhatsApp with its own pre-filled message.

whatsapp_optin_popup.name: Xeyo — Opt-in popup
whatsapp_optin_popup.intro: WhatsApp opt-in popup on the cart page (before abandonment). Connect WhatsApp in Xeyo to activate it. Customize it below.
whatsapp_optin_popup.title: Title
whatsapp_optin_popup.subtitle: Subtitle
whatsapp_optin_popup.trigger_intro: The popup appears on an engagement signal (exit intent on desktop, scrolling on mobile), never right on arrival. The delay below is a minimum safety threshold before any display.
whatsapp_optin_popup.display_mode_cart: When the cart is not empty (recommended)
whatsapp_optin_popup.custom_paths_info: URL paths separated by commas. e.g. /cart, /products, /collections/sale
